name: cast-imaging-to-aws-transform-custom
description: Two-phase application modernisation power. Phase 1 uses CAST Imaging MCP to perform deep structural assessment, determine the optimal modernisation path through data-driven probing, and generate a fully-structured Phase 2 transformation definition. Phase 2 executes the TD via AWS Transform Custom with CAST Imaging MCP available for verification and impact analysis. Supports Technology Upgrades (language, framework version, framework migration), Security Remediation (CVEs, structural flaws), Code Refactoring (dead code, complexity, coupling, idioms), and Cloud Readiness (blocker resolution, state externalization, containerization).
